title: lobelia glandulifera
intro: Lobelia glandulifera, also known as Indian tobacco, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, expectorant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lobelia glandulifera include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Lobelia glandulifera is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and its herbal preparations are typically used in moderation due to its potential toxicity.
